category_sources: source_facts.description says dos2unix converts text between DOS, UNIX, and Mac formats; official manual describes line-ending and encoding conversion.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official dos2unix homepage identify the project as dos2unix.
docs_sources: Official dos2unix site links to the English manual and notes the current project homepage.
repo_sources: Official dos2unix development section gives the Git clone URL https://git.code.sf.net/p/dos2unix/dos2unix because source_facts.repo is empty.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, and official manual support text conversion, DOS/Unix/Mac line endings, and CLI tags.
